name: spec-to-code
description: Marketplace hosting the spec-to-code plugin — a gated, test-driven flow that turns incomplete specs into complete, verified code.

plugins.name: spec-to-code
plugins.description: A gated TDD flow that turns an incomplete or ambiguous spec into complete, verified code: find gaps, resolve them with the user before any code, then prove the result with tests, screenshots, and traceability docs.
